name: Strawbery Banana Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Mix together the mashed bananas, chopped strawberries, and sugar. Set aside.
3. Mix together the flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
4. Using a pastry blender, mix in the softened butter until the mixture is coarse.
5. Beat the eggs slightly and add them to the dry ingredients one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Stir in the banana mixture. The dough will be very moist and messy. Use your hands to combine it thoroughly until all of the flour mixture is incorporated (it will still be very moist).
7. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and shape it into a disk. Dust the top with additional flour.
8. Roll the dough into an 3/4" thick rectangle.
9. Cut the dough into squares or large wedges using a knife.
10. Place the cut pieces onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
11. Bake in the center of the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
